draft.subject: the_draft
draft.label: The draft in row nine
draft.blurb: Forty years of maintenance tickets, every one closed 'no fault found'. Somebody should cross-reference them. Nobody ever has.
draft.text: Ninety minutes of cold-spot reports, thermal surveys, and one janitor's increasingly personal margin notes ('it moved my cart AGAIN'). Plotted together, the anomalies aren't random — they trace the shelving rows like someone doing rounds. You learn the trick the janitor never did: where not-quite-to-look. Between one shelf and the next, the air is reading over your shoulder. It puts the file back for you.
